occupation: Vice President of AOTO Electronics SPAIN at AOTO Electronics
headline: VP of AOTO Electronics SPAIN
location_str: 中国 广东省 深圳

experiences.title: Vice President of AOTO Electronics SPAIN
experiences.description: AOTO Electronics (“AOTO”) was established in 1993 and has since then evolved to become a publicly-listed company on the Shenzhen Stock Exchange (ticker symbol: 002587) in June 2011. Our corporate mission is to be a world-class provider of intelligent visual communication solutions catering to a broad spectrum of industries including film and television, advertising, government and enterprises, leasing, education, banking, communications, postal services, landscape lighting, and digital creativity. AOTO Electronics is composed of 18 member companies, which include five overseas subsidiaries. Our workforce is comprised of over 1,300 employees, with approximately 400 of them dedicated to research and development.

experiences.title: Sales Director EMEA
experiences.description: AOTO Electronics Co., Ltd. (“AOTO”) is a diversified holding company registered in Shenzhen, China. Under AOTO there are four key strategic business units, such as highest quality LED display, banking electronics, lighting engineering and sports operation. Over the years we have grown to become a world leading display provider offering a complete line of indoor and outdoor direct view LED display products. We are also proud that we were the first publicly held company in the LED display industry in China (Shenzhen Stock Exchange: 002587).

experiences.title: International Sales Manager
experiences.description: AOTO Electronics (Stock:002587), which founded in 1993, is specialized in designing and manufacturing high-end quality LED Display System. AOTO is a world-leading LED display complete solution provider and the first listed company of LED display industry in China. * Top-ranked National high-tech enterprise in China * Have over 15,000 installation over 50 countries around the world * Production facilities in Nanjing and Huizhou : 70,000 sqm * Production Capacity : 15,000 sqm per month * AOTO has 1,200+ employees, including 180+ market-oriented R&D engineers, every year more than 10% investment turnover AOTO Unique Technologies * 8K 24bit Processing System * Revolutionary Energy Saving * Up to 16,000Hz Refresh Rate * Remote Control and Monitor Platform * Great Eagle Cloud Platform We believe that each technology innovation and progress can create commercial value for clients, moreover, establish a win-win partnership.

experiences.company: Shen Zhen (China East) Electronics Co., Ltd.
experiences.title: Sales and Marketing Manager
